## DESIGN-OPS

Ce projet utilise [DESIGN-OPS](https://github.com/opensesh/DESIGN-OPS) pour la coordination design & développement.

### Quick Reference

- **Commands:** `/design-ops:` (dashboard, status, daily-brief, configure…)
- **Plugin:** `.claude/plugins/design-ops/`
- **Skills:** accessibility-audit, design-system-quality, frontend-design…
<!-- DESIGN-OPS:END -->

<!-- KARIMO:START - Do not edit between markers -->
## KARIMO

This project uses [KARIMO](https://github.com/opensesh/KARIMO) for PRD-driven autonomous development.

### Quick Reference

- **Commands:** Type `/karimo:` to see all commands
- **Agent rules:** `.claude/plugins/karimo/KARIMO_RULES.md`
- **Configuration:** `.karimo/config.yaml`
- **Learnings:** `.karimo/learnings/`

### Projet

| Paramètre | Valeur |
|-----------|--------|
| Mode | fast-track (sans GitHub) |
| Runtime | Node.js / Next.js 14 |
| Package manager | npm |
| Build | `npm run build` |
| Modèle par défaut | sonnet |
<!-- KARIMO:END -->
